instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall enable creep function in Drive mode.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall apply creep torque when brake pedal is released.

L4_requirements: IF Gear_Position = Drive AND Brake_Pedal = Released THEN Enable_Creep_Torque

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall limit creep speed.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable creep when Vehicle_Speed exceeds Creep_Speed_Limit.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall prevent creep when brake is pressed.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable creep torque when Brake_Pedal equals pressed.

L4_requirements: IF Brake_Pedal = Released AND Gear_Position = Drive THEN Enable_Creep_Torque

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable creep in reverse gear.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall prevent creep torque when Gear_Position equals Reverse.

L4_requirements: IF Gear_Position = Drive AND Brake_Pedal = Released THEN Enable_Creep_Torque

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall control creep torque level.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall apply predefined creep torque when creep mode is active.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall detect abnormal creep speed.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall detect fault when Vehicle_Speed exceeds Max_Creep_Speed.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed > Max_Creep_Speed THEN Creep_Speed_Fault = TRUE

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall disable creep during faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall disable creep torque when transmission fault occurs.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall enable creep only when engine is running.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall activate creep torque only when Engine_State equals running.

L4_requirements: IF Engine_State = Running AND Brake_Pedal = Released THEN Enable_Creep_Torque
IF Engine_State = Running AND Gear_Position = Drive THEN Allow_Creep_Mode

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall maintain safe gear during creep faults.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall maintain predefined gear when creep fault occurs.

instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall clear creep faults after recovery.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall clear creep fault when creep conditions return to normal.

L4_requirements: IF Vehicle_Speed <= Creep_Speed_Limit AND Brake_Pedal = Released THEN Clear_Creep_Fault
